description_long: This object is a collection of various hammers and mallets, each with distinct head shapes and handle designs. The set includes claw hammers, ball-peen hammers, sledgehammers, wooden mallets, and rubber mallets, all arranged in a row. The handles are primarily made of wood, with some featuring a natural finish and others painted or coated. The hammer heads are mostly metallic, with some being blackened or polished, while the mallet heads are made of wood or rubber. The tools vary in size, with the sledgehammer and mallets being the largest, and the claw and ball-peen hammers being more compact. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present on any of the tools.
description: A diverse set of hammers and mallets with wooden handles and various head types, including metal, wood, and rubber. The collection features claw, ball-peen, sledge, and mallet designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full lineup of hammers and mallets, clearly displaying the variety of head shapes and handle lengths.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and profile of the hammer and mallet heads, as well as the length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back sides of the hammer heads and the ends of the handles, with mallet faces and hammer claws visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the width and depth of the hammer heads and mallets, with handle alignment visible.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden straight handles with a smooth finish, some slightly contoured for grip, all appearing to be made from natural wood.
attribute_head_type: Variety of hammer heads including claw, ball-peen, sledge, cross-peen, wooden mallet, and rubber mallet types; heads are metallic, wooden, or rubber with distinct striking faces and claws where applicable.
